name: Courtyard CYH8815 Power Loomed Indoor/Outdoor Area Rug - Natural/Beige - 5'3" X 7'6" - Safavieh.
description: Courtyard indoor-outdoor rugs bring interior design style to busy living spaces, inside and out. Courtyard is beautifully styled with patterns from classic to contemporary, all in colors, shapes, and sizes to fit any area. Courtyard area rugs are made with enhanced polypropylene in a special sisal weave that achieves intricate designs that are easy to maintain�- simply clean with a garden hose. Care Instructions: Hose Clean With Water
